content: The differing intrinsic reward calibration of ICM vs RND curiosity-driven RL agents can be repurposed to actively prune and prioritize stored episodic memories in 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agents, replacing fixed memory capacity heuristics. Memory entries that trigger high intrinsic surprise (as measured by an ICM/RND-derived novelty score) are retained long-term, while low-novelty redundant memories are automatically discarded to avoid catastrophic forgetting of rare high-value experiences.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
